notes.message: Phase 0 plans execute on main branch for initialization. Phase 1+ plans require feature branches.
Phase 0 complete: monorepo-structure, json-schema-foundation, codegen-pipeline all done. 15 commits on main. Ready for Phase 1.

Phase 1 architecture review by @architect: domain-models and context-assembly blocked due to critical gaps against v1-spec. cli-daemon-foundation, sync-contract, acp-client require expansion but can proceed after Wave 0 revision. Missing V1.0 mandatory items: Creator domain model, StoryManifest, ForkBranch, manuscript/research commands.
